---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new trigger type, transport, or capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What you want**
The behavior or capability you'd like — e.g. a new network kind, a trigger
option, an admin command.

**Why**
The use case it unlocks.

**Sketch (optional)**
A config snippet showing how you'd expect to configure it, or notes on the
approach.
